course.title: How To Start Your Own Property Management Business For Short Term Rentals
course.keywords: Learn how to start your property management business step by step, start getting bookings and boost your revenue.

seo-v_introduction_to_seo__663dc30d52888.title: Introduction to the course
seo-v_introduction_to_seo__663dc30d52888.description: Introduction to the course: the topics you'll learn and a summary of what you need to know about property management.

seo-v_making_the_decision__663dc30d53ebb.title: The Business plan
seo-v_making_the_decision__663dc30d53ebb.description: A step by step guide to build your business plan: executive summary, market and audience analysis, marketing plan etc.

airbn_create_the_perfect_airbnb_listing_.title: Business structure deep dive
airbn_create_the_perfect_airbnb_listing_.description: We’ll deep dive into the different types of business for your activity. What’s specific about each of them, their advantages and disadvantages if there ara any and what will suit your business idea the best.

airbn_on_your_way_to_super_host_create_a.title: Chapter 4: Licenses, law & regulations
airbn_on_your_way_to_super_host_create_a.description: All you need to know to start operating as a Property Manager as soon as possible.

airbn_automate_your_airbnb__663dc30e37a2.title: Set your business and client relationships
airbn_automate_your_airbnb__663dc30e37a2.description: Learn how to establish good client relationships: define your USP, your services, learn how to redact a contract and set your revenue strategy.

airbn_cancellation_policies__663dc30e78b.title: Managing your operations
airbn_cancellation_policies__663dc30e78b.description: The main day-to-day tasks you'll need to manage to run your property management business.

airbn_protect_yourself__663dc30eca91c.title: The tools you need as a property manager
airbn_protect_yourself__663dc30eca91c.description: Learn how to use a PMS and other tools to help you manage your business.

prope_your_marketing_strategy.title: Your marketing strategy
prope_your_marketing_strategy.description: Learn how to promote your business and the properties you manage to boost bookings.

airbn_protect_yourself__663de89050d29.title: Growth and expansion
airbn_protect_yourself__663de89050d29.description: How to expand your client portfolio and scale up you business.
